attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT   RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SMOAV.BATCHID_SOURCE,SMOAV.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) + MAX_VAL AP_VENDOR_INVOICE_BATCH_KEY,
       SMOAV.BATCHID_SOURCE, SMOAV.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  FROM (SELECT SMABA.BATCHID_SOURCE, NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
          FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL SMABA,
               $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
         WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMABA.GLOBAL_NAME) SMOAV,
       (SELECT COALESCE (MAX (AP_VENDOR_INVOICE_BATCH_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL
          FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_AP_VENDOR_INVOICE_BATCH) SMAV
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
            FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_AP_VENDOR_INVOICE_BATCH SAVIB
           WHERE SAVIB.SK_BATCH_ID_INT = SMOAV.BATCHID_SOURCE
             AND SAVIB.SS_CD = SMOAV.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)

SELECT
SMAVIB.AP_VENDOR_INVOICE_BATCH_KEY,
SMABA.BATCH_NAME as BK_APVI_BATCH_NAME,
EHAOU.NAME AS BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE,
SMABA.CONTROL_INVOICE_COUNT as APVI_CONTROL_INVOICE_CNT,
SMABA.CONTROL_INVOICE_TOTAL as APVI_CONTROL_INVOICE_TOTAL_AMT,
SMABA.BATCH_DATE as APVI_BATCH_DTM,
'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLAG,
SMABA.BATCHID_SOURCE as SK_BATCH_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE as SS_CD,
SMABA.ACTION_CODE ,
'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM
(
     SELECT
      SABA.BATCH_DATE ,
      SABA.BATCHID_SOURCE ,
      SABA.BATCH_NAME,
      SABA.CONTROL_INVOICE_COUNT ,
      SABA.CONTROL_INVOICE_TOTAL ,
      SABA.GLOBAL_NAME ,
      SABA.ORG_ID ,
      SABA.ACTION_CODE
      FROM
       $$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL SABA
     UNION ALL
     SELECT
      EXAB.BATCH_DATE ,
      EXAB.BATCHID_SOURCE ,
      EXAB.BATCH_NAME,
      EXAB.CONTROL_INVOICE_COUNT ,
      EXAB.CONTROL_INVOICE_TOTAL ,
      EXAB.GLOBAL_NAME ,
      EXAB.ORG_ID ,
      EXAB.ACTION_CODE
      FROM  
     $$EXCEPDB.EX_AP_BATCHES EXAB) SMABA
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
     ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMABA.GLOBAL_NAME )
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_AP_VENDOR_INVOICE_BATCH SMAVIB
     ON (SMAVIB.SK_BATCH_ID_INT=SMABA.BATCHID_SOURCE 
        AND SMAVIB.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN (SELECT ORGANIZATION_ID,GLOBAL_NAME ,NAME
              FROM
             $$ETLVWDB.EL_HR_ALL_ORG_UNITS EL_ORG
               WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT N_ORG
                              WHERE EL_ORG.NAME = N_ORG.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE 
                             )
            )EHAOU
          ON (EHAOU.ORGANIZATION_ID = SMABA.ORG_ID
                                       AND EHAOU.GLOBAL_NAME = SMABA.GLOBAL_NAME )

SELECT
      SMABA.BATCH_ID,
      SMABA.BATCH_DATE ,
      SMABA.BATCHID_SOURCE ,
      SMABA.BATCH_NAME,
      SMABA.CONTROL_INVOICE_COUNT ,
      SMABA.CONTROL_INVOICE_TOTAL ,
      SMABA.GLOBAL_NAME ,
      SMABA.ORG_ID ,
      SMABA.CREATE_DATETIME ,
      SMABA.ACTION_CODE,
      'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_BATCHES_ALL SMABA
WHERE 
 NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM (SELECT ORGANIZATION_ID,GLOBAL_NAME ,NAME 
                                FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_HR_ALL_ORG_UNITS EL_ORG 
                                WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT N_ORG
                                               WHERE EL_ORG.NAME = N_ORG.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE )
                                )EHAOU
              WHERE EHAOU.ORGANIZATION_ID = SMABA.ORG_ID
                    AND EHAOU.GLOBAL_NAME = SMABA.GLOBAL_NAME )

SELECT
SMAVIB.AP_VENDOR_INVOICE_BATCH_KEY,
SMABA.BATCH_NAME as BK_APVI_BATCH_NAME,
EHAOU.NAME AS BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE,
SMABA.CONTROL_INVOICE_COUNT as APVI_CONTROL_INVOICE_CNT,
SMABA.CONTROL_INVOICE_TOTAL as APVI_CONTROL_INVOICE_TOTAL_AMT,
SMABA.BATCH_DATE as APVI_BATCH_DTM,
'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLAG,
SMABA.BATCH_ID as SK_BATCH_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE as SS_CD,
SMABA.ACTION_CODE ,
'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM
(
     SELECT
      SABA.BATCH_DATE ,
      SABA.BATCH_ID ,
      SABA.BATCH_NAME,
      SABA.CONTROL_INVOICE_COUNT ,
      SABA.CONTROL_INVOICE_TOTAL ,
      SABA.GLOBAL_NAME ,
      SABA.ORG_ID ,
      SABA.ACTION_CODE
      FROM
       $$STGDB.ST_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL SABA
     UNION ALL
     SELECT
      EXAB.BATCH_DATE ,
      EXAB.BATCH_ID ,
      EXAB.BATCH_NAME,
      EXAB.CONTROL_INVOICE_COUNT ,
      EXAB.CONTROL_INVOICE_TOTAL ,
      EXAB.GLOBAL_NAME ,
      EXAB.ORG_ID ,
      EXAB.ACTION_CODE
      FROM  
     $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_AP_BATCHES EXAB) SMABA
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
     ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMABA.GLOBAL_NAME )
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_AP_VENDOR_INVOICE_BATCH SMAVIB
     ON (SMAVIB.SK_BATCH_ID_INT=SMABA.BATCH_ID
        AND SMAVIB.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN (SELECT ORGANIZATION_ID,GLOBAL_NAME ,NAME
              FROM
             $$ETLVWDB.EL_HR_ALL_ORG_UNITS EL_ORG
               WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT N_ORG
                              WHERE EL_ORG.NAME = N_ORG.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE 
                             )
            )EHAOU
          ON (EHAOU.ORGANIZATION_ID = SMABA.ORG_ID
                                       AND EHAOU.GLOBAL_NAME = SMABA.GLOBAL_NAME )

SELECT   RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SMOAV.BATCH_ID,SMOAV.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) + MAX_VAL AP_VENDOR_INVOICE_BATCH_KEY,
       SMOAV.BATCH_ID, SMOAV.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  FROM (SELECT SMABA.BATCH_ID, NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
          FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL SMABA,
               $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
         WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMABA.GLOBAL_NAME) SMOAV,
       (SELECT COALESCE (MAX (AP_VENDOR_INVOICE_BATCH_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL
          FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_AP_VENDOR_INVOICE_BATCH) SMAV
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
            FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_AP_VENDOR_INVOICE_BATCH SAVIB
           WHERE SAVIB.SK_BATCH_ID_INT = SMOAV.BATCH_ID
             AND SAVIB.SS_CD = SMOAV.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)

SELECT
      SMABA.BATCH_ID,
      SMABA.BATCH_DATE ,
      SMABA.BATCH_ID ,
      SMABA.BATCH_NAME,
      SMABA.CONTROL_INVOICE_COUNT ,
      SMABA.CONTROL_INVOICE_TOTAL ,
      SMABA.GLOBAL_NAME ,
      SMABA.ORG_ID ,
      SMABA.CREATE_DATETIME ,
      SMABA.ACTION_CODE,
      'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_AP_BATCHES_ALL SMABA
WHERE 
 NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM (SELECT ORGANIZATION_ID,GLOBAL_NAME ,NAME 
                                FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_HR_ALL_ORG_UNITS EL_ORG 
                                WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT N_ORG
                                               WHERE EL_ORG.NAME = N_ORG.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE )
                                )EHAOU
              WHERE EHAOU.ORGANIZATION_ID = SMABA.ORG_ID
                    AND EHAOU.GLOBAL_NAME = SMABA.GLOBAL_NAME )
